to say a phone number
Single-digit method: Usually, each digit of a phone number is spoken separately (for example: ০-১-৭ …).
Pairing digits: Sometimes, to speak faster, the last four or six digits are said in pairs (for example: ০০-০০-০০).
Pause: After saying the operator code (such as ০১৭), it is convenient to make a short pause before saying the rest of the number.
